notes: Subject-position 'dia' in a simple preference statement → 'They like coffee'. Sibling to case_001 but with a stative verb instead of motion. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: confirms the singular-they default reads naturally for habits/preferences (a common conversational context). The rule's inject is a no-op here because expected_target already contains 'They' (capitalized) and conservative inject only replaces 'he/she/He/She' when neither lowercase 'they' nor a gendered pronoun is present — case_003 just exercises preProcess marker tagging.
